description: Synthetic HL7 v2.4 ORU^R01 CBC result from an EDAN H60S 3-part hematology analyzer (MLLP / port 7999; the analyzer is the TCP client, our edge listens) carrying analyzer-native (local, 99EDAN) observation codes and raw vendor units — the Stage-1 milestone vehicle (LIS-17 / S1.5). All observations are final (OBX-11 = F). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-17 / S1.5 milestone — EDAN H60S LIS interface manual, CBC result profile)
source.note: Application payload only (no MLLP framing). HL7 v2.4 with EDAN-native 99EDAN codes (WBC/RBC/HGB/HCT/MCV/PLT) and EDAN-default units (HGB in g/L, RBC in 10^12/L) so normalization exercises a second vendor's terminology beyond the RAYTO seed. The 10^9/L and 10^12/L unit carets are HL7-escaped on the wire (10\S\9/L) since '^' is the component separator; the tolerant parser unescapes them to 10^9/L before normalization. A real EDAN H60S capture replaces this at bench conformance (LIS-74 access checklist): set synthetic:false with a capture reference.
